Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ApexDebuggerSession

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ApexDebuggerSession
public class ApexDebuggerSession extends SObject

Java class for ApexDebuggerSession complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ApexDebuggerSession">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EntryPointFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAsyncIgnored" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInternal" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="License" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LicenseOrg" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LicenseType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RequestTypeFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StatusBy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StatusMessage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StatusUsername" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserIdFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
